name: Mali GPU Optimization
description: Mali TBDR (Helio G100 / G57 MC2) performance tuning for Minecraft 26.1.2. v1.3.0: deep debug logging for the whole game, apply-at-boot so all changes land at game start, resource-reload instrumentation, Mod Menu config screen. VulkanMod-safe: engine-side only.

custom.maligpu:target: Mali-G57 MC2 / MediaTek Helio G100 (Valhall, TBDR)
